description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a natural wood grain finish and a modern, minimalist design. The left side features a vertical stack of four cream-colored drawers with sleek black handles, providing ample storage space. The right side has an open shelf area beneath the desktop, suitable for storing books, a computer tower, or other office supplies. The back and sides of the desk are fully enclosed with matching wood panels, giving it a sturdy and cohesive appearance. The desktop is spacious and flat, ideal for writing, working on a computer, or organizing documents. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, making it suitable for both professional and home office environments.
description: A modern wooden desk with four cream drawers on the left and an open shelf on the right, featuring a spacious wood-grain top and enclosed sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing four cream drawers with black handles on the left and an open shelf on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with no visible drawers or shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the enclosed back panel and the open shelf structure on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a solid wood panel, with a slight glimpse of the cream drawers at the front edge.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and open shelf is intended to face the user, with the drawers on the left and the open shelf on the right.
